tasks.prompt: Run /Users/fox/Claude\ Code/.claude/scripts/daily-push.sh and push Claude Code repo to GitHub.

清理 .playwright-mcp 目录下超过7天的日志文件：
- console-*.log
- page-*.yml  
- page-*.png

命令：
find /Users/fox/Claude\ Code/.playwright-mcp -name "console-*.log" -mtime +7 -delete
find /Users/fox/Claude\ Code/.playwright-mcp -name "page-*.yml" -mtime +7 -delete
find /Users/fox/Claude\ Code/.playwright-mcp -name "page-*.png" -mtime +7 -delete

每周一上午9点执行一次。
